productDisplayName: Nike Women Solarsoft Thong Pink Slipper
description: One look at these flip flops and your feet are bound to sigh with the pleasure of relaxation. The nike Solarsoft thongs are designed keeping in mind absolute cushioned comfort to relax your feet and offer a comfortable ride. It's so flexible that you can squeeze with all your might and it still bounces back to shape. Upper Grooved man-made TPU footbed for absolute all-day comfort and massaged feel Soft rubber straps with a toe separator for abrasion-free support and to hold the foot in place Outsole PU outsole with patent pending waffle pattern lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip even on wet surfaces shoe care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
